sql-case.value: LOAD LABEL example_db.label1 (DATA INFILE ("s3://bucket/data.csv") INTO TABLE `t_order` COLUMNS TERMINATED BY "," FORMAT AS "CSV" (order_id, user_id, status)) WITH S3 ("AWS_ENDPOINT" = "s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com", "AWS_ACCESS_KEY" = "ak", "AWS_SECRET_KEY" = "sk", "AWS_REGION" = "us-west-2") PROPERTIES ("timeout" = "3600")

LOAD LABEL demo.label_20220402 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/tmp/test_hdfs.txt") INTO TABLE `load_hdfs_file_test` COLUMNS TERMINATED BY "\t" (id, age, name)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user") PROPERTIES ("timeout" = "1200", "max_filter_ratio" = "0.1")

LOAD LABEL example_db.label2 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file") INTO TABLE `my_table` PARTITION (p1, p2) COLUMNS TERMINATED BY "," (k1, k2, k3)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")

LOAD LABEL example_db.label4 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file") INTO TABLE `my_table` FORMAT AS "parquet" (k1, k2, k3)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")

LOAD LABEL example_db.label5 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/city=beijing/*/*") INTO TABLE `my_table` FORMAT AS "csv" (k1, k2, k3) COLUMNS FROM PATH AS (city, utc_date)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")

LOAD LABEL example_db.label6 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file") INTO TABLE `my_table` (k1, k2, v1) SET (v1 = k1 + k2) PRECEDING FILTER k1 = 1 WHERE k1 > 0) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")

LOAD LABEL example_db.label8 (MERGE DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file") INTO TABLE `my_table` (k1, k2, v1) DELETE ON v1 > 100) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user") PROPERTIES ("timeout" = "3600", "max_filter_ratio" = "0.1")

LOAD LABEL example_db.label9 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file") INTO TABLE `my_table` COLUMNS TERMINATED BY "," (k1, k2, source_sequence, v1, v2) ORDER BY source_sequence) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")
LOAD LABEL example_db.label10 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file") NEGATIVE INTO TABLE `my_table` (k1, k2, v1)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")
LOAD LABEL example_db.label11 (DELETE DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file") INTO TABLE `my_table` (k1, k2, v1)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")
LOAD LABEL example_db.label12 (APPEND DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file") INTO TABLE `my_table` (k1, k2, v1)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")

LOAD LABEL example_db.label13 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file.gz") INTO TABLE `my_table` COMPRESS_TYPE AS "gz" (k1, k2, k3)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")

LOAD LABEL example_db.label14 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file") INTO TABLE `my_table` COLUMNS TERMINATED BY "," LINES TERMINATED BY "\n" (k1, k2, k3)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")

LOAD LABEL example_db.label15 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file") INTO TABLE `my_table` (k1, k2)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user") COMMENT 'test broker load'

LOAD LABEL example_db.label17 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file1") INTO TABLE `table1` (k1, k2), DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file2") INTO TABLE `table2` (k1, k2, k3)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")
LOAD LABEL example_db.label18 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file") INTO TABLE `my_table` (k1, k2)) WITH BROKER "broker_name" ("username" = "user", "password" = "pass")

LOAD LABEL db1.job1 (DATA INFILE ("s3://bucket/path/file.csv") INTO TABLE `users` COLUMNS TERMINATED BY "," FORMAT AS "CSV" (user_id, name, age) PROPERTIES ("trim_double_quotes" = "true")) WITH S3 ("AWS_ENDPOINT" = "s3.amazonaws.com", "AWS_ACCESS_KEY" = "ak", "AWS_SECRET_KEY" = "sk", "AWS_REGION" = "us-east-1") PROPERTIES ("timeout" = "3600")
LOAD LABEL label_simple (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/data.txt") INTO TABLE `t1` (c1, c2)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")

LOAD LABEL example_db.label7 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/user/data/*/test.txt") INTO TABLE `tbl12` COLUMNS TERMINATED BY "," (k2, k3) COLUMNS FROM PATH AS (data_time) SET (data_time = data_time)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS" = "hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")

LOAD LABEL example_db.label2 (DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file-10*") INTO TABLE `my_table1` PARTITION (p1) COLUMNS TERMINATED BY "," (k1, tmp_k2, tmp_k3) SET (k2 = tmp_k2 + 1, k3 = tmp_k3 + 1), DATA INFILE ("hdfs://host:port/input/file-20*") INTO TABLE `my_table2` COLUMNS TERMINATED BY "," (k1, k2, k3)) WITH HDFS ("fs.defaultFS"="hdfs://host:port", "hadoop.username" = "user")
